mainEntity.name: Who manufactures Ridhvick school uniforms and where are they made?

acceptedAnswer.text: Ridhvick Uniforms is a school and sports uniform manufacturer based in Tirupur, Tamil Nadu — India's largest knitwear manufacturing hub. Ridhvick has designed, woven, and embroidered uniforms in-house at its own facility since 2009, with a second sales office in Chennai.

mainEntity.name: What types of school uniforms does Ridhvick manufacture?

acceptedAnswer.text: Ridhvick manufactures the full range a school needs from a single vendor: kindergarten and primary daily wear (polos, tunics, pinafores, jumpers), high school woven uniforms and tailored blazers, sports and house-color athletic wear, and accessories such as ties, socks, and backpacks.

mainEntity.name: Does Ridhvick offer custom logo embroidery for school uniforms?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Ridhvick runs computerized, high thread-density embroidery in-house so school crests and logos stay crisp, colorfast, and durable through repeated washing. Digitizing setup and chest-logo placement are handled as part of the same production run as the uniform itself, with no third-party embroidery vendor involved.

mainEntity.name: Can Ridhvick handle bulk school uniform orders for an entire institution?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — bulk institutional and school-wide orders are Ridhvick's core business. Every stage, from thread-blend trials and physical fabric sampling to cutting, stitching, embroidery, and regional distribution, is managed under one roof, which keeps bulk orders on a single predictable production timeline instead of being split across subcontractors.

mainEntity.name: How do I get a price quote or request physical fabric samples?

acceptedAnswer.text: Add the uniforms you need to your inquiry package on the Ridhvick website and submit the request form with your school or organization name, or email sales@ridhvickapparels.in directly. The Ridhvick sales desk responds with pricing and physical fabric swatch availability within 24 business hours.

mainEntity.name: What fabrics are used in Ridhvick's sports uniforms?

acceptedAnswer.text: Ridhvick's sports and athletic wear line uses aero-knit moisture-wicking performance polyester, breathable CoolMesh panels, and heavyweight interlock knit for track jackets — chosen specifically for ventilation and quick-dry performance during school sports periods.
